The '''Vlassy Nature Preserve''' was a secluded wildlife preserve, located along the [[Vlassy River]] on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]]. Located eight hundred kilometers southeast of [[Pesktda]], the Preserve was a popular destination for Garqians and off-world tourists alike. Due to the Preserve's forested bluffs and canyons, the region was deemed unsuitable for farming, and has been a nature preserve since the planet's founding.

At some point, the Preserve's [[rdava-bird]]s were dying off due to a nerve agent released by [[Chine Gabbard]]'s research station.

[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] visited the Preserve shortly before their wedding.
